steps.title: Locate the highest bar on the graph
steps.content: The question asks for “the highest percentage of lithium recovered in the tests.” Scanning the four bars across both battery types and processes, the dark bar representing Process 2 for Type B extends highest on the y-axis, reaching near the 80% gridline.

steps.title: Match the peak value to the answer choices
steps.content: The Type B, Process 2 bar reaches approximately 76% lithium recovered. Among the choices given, 75% is closest to this peak value. The other three options (10%, 20%, and 45%) correspond to values from the lower bars on the chart. That matches choice A — A is correct.
